title: Payment API endpoints — plans, create-order, webhook, access-status, credit-balance
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/payment/plans: if PAYMENT_ENABLED=false → 503 {"error":"payment_not_configured"}; else calls getClientCountry(), returns JSON array of plan objects: [{id, name, description, amountPaise, currency, grantType, daysOrCredits, isRecommended}]. India (isIndia=true OR confidence=unknown) gets both monthly_pass and credits_pack plans. isIndia=false AND confidence=high gets only credits_pack (international card path not available in Phase 1 — returns empty array with a note field).

POST /api/payment/create-order: rate-limited to 5 requests per IP per 15 minutes (use a simple in-memory Map<ip, attempts[]> — no Redis dependency needed at this stage); validates request body has planId (string); looks up plan config from env vars; calls createOrder(); returns {orderId, amountPaise, currency, razorpayKeyId: process.env.RAZORPAY_KEY_ID}. Does NOT write to DB — subscription row created only on payment.captured webhook.

POST /api/payment/webhook: MUST use raw body capture — register route with Fastify addContentTypeParser('application/json', ...) to capture rawBody as Buffer before any parsing. Calls verifyWebhookSignature(rawBody, request.headers['x-razorpay-signature']); on failure → 400 {"error":"invalid_signature"} with no side effects. Checks processed_webhook_events for duplicate event ID (from payload.id) — if found → 200 immediately. For event 'payment.captured': create access_grants row (grant_type, days_granted from planId, expires_at = NOW() + days, status='active'), insert credit_transactions row if grant_type='credits_pack' (credits_delta = credits purchased), insert processed_webhook_events row. For event 'payment.failed': log only. All DB writes in a single transaction. Returns 200 on success.

GET /api/payment/access-status: if PAYMENT_ENABLED=false → {"hasAccess":true,"expiresAt":null,"daysRemaining":null}; else queries access_grants for a row with status='active' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'); returns {hasAccess: boolean, expiresAt: string|null, daysRemaining: number|null}.
GET /api/payment/credit-balance: if PAYMENT_ENABLED=false → {"balance":null,"enabled":false}; else calls getCreditBalance(db); returns {"balance": number, "enabled": true}.
All five routes are registered under the /api/payment prefix and are EXCLUDED from the access gate middleware (T-68).
All routes use Fastify JSON schema validation for request bodies.
RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET and RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET are never included in any response body.
src/server.ts is modified only to register the payment router — no other changes to server logic.
output_format: src/payment/routes.ts plus the minimal server.ts diff, plus plain-English explanation of the raw-body capture pattern and why the webhook route uses a different content-type parser
